'''chadhapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mneme|mneme]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mneme|mneme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chadhapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chædhæpæth|chædhæpæth]] || [[word:chædhæpæj|chædhæpæj]] || [[word:chædhæpæsh|chædhæpæsh]] || [[word:chædhæpæ|chædhæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chadhadhapath|chadhadhapath]] || [[word:chadhadhapaj|chadhadhapaj]] || [[word:chadhadhapash|chadhadhapash]] || [[word:chadhadhapa|chadhadhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chadhapath|chadhapath]] || [[word:chadhapaj|chadhapaj]] || [[word:chadhapash|chadhapash]] || [[word:chadhapa|chadhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chadhafpath|chadhafpath]] || [[word:chadhafpaj|chadhafpaj]] || [[word:chadhafpash|chadhafpash]] || [[word:chadhafpaf|chadhafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chadhapatha|chadhapatha]] || [[word:chadhapaja|chadhapaja]] || [[word:chadhapasha|chadhapasha]] || [[word:chadhapaka|chadhapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chadhapath|chadhapath]] || [[word:chadhapaj|chadhapaj]] || [[word:chadhapash|chadhapash]] || [[word:chadhapa|chadhapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chadhapathal|chadhapathal]] || [[word:chadhapajal|chadhapajal]] || [[word:chadhapashal|chadhapashal]] || [[word:chadhapakal|chadhapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chadhapathatha|chadhapathatha]] || [[word:chadhapajaja|chadhapajaja]] || [[word:chadhapashasha|chadhapashasha]] || [[word:chadhapaka|chadhapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chadhapathan|chadhapathan]] || [[word:chadhapajan|chadhapajan]] || [[word:chadhapashan|chadhapashan]] || [[word:chadhapakan|chadhapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chadhapathaoro|chadhapathaoro]] || [[word:chadhapajaoro|chadhapajaoro]] || [[word:chadhapashaoro|chadhapashaoro]] || [[word:chadhapakaoro|chadhapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
